message:
Update Cargo.lock: workspace dependency tree refresh

Major transitive dependency updates from workspace crate bumps:
- asupersync: 0.1.1 -> 0.2.5 (switched from bincode to bincode-next)
- franken-decision/evidence/kernel: 0.1.0 -> 0.2.5
- ftui and all ftui-* subcrates: 0.1.1 -> 0.2.1
  (ftui-text now depends on unicode-width)
- nix: 0.29.0 -> 0.31.1
- polling: 2.8.0 -> 3.11.0 (now uses rustix instead of raw libc)
- bitflags: consolidated from 1.3.2 + 2.10.0 to single 2.11.0
- bumpalo: 3.19.1 -> 3.20.2
- libc: 0.2.181 -> 0.2.180 (downgraded by resolver)
- New crates: bincode-next, bincode_derive-next, unty-next,
  virtue-next, getrandom 0.4.1, unicode-width, hermit-abi
- Removed: bitflags 1.3.2, windows-sys 0.48.0,
  windows-targets 0.48.5, and all windows_*_0.48.5 crates
  (polling no longer needs the old Windows API)

No Cargo.toml changes -- this is a lockfile-only refresh from
path dependency updates in the workspace.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
